areas.name: Green Meadow
areas.theme: Sunny rolling hills, soft grass, wildflowers, beginner-friendly
areas.description: The gentle starting region of Wild Haven. Open fields, low capture difficulty, and the friendliest creatures make this the perfect place to learn the ropes.

areas.name: Undead Realm
areas.description: A spooky graveyard where undead creatures roam. Watch out for the glowing bones!

areas.name: Coming Soon
areas.description: A mysterious new area is currently under development. Stay tuned for future updates!
